ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "contract_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract expires */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Coach's area of specialization */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the coach is associated with */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required for the sport */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed for the sport */,
  "popular_in" TEXT /* Countries or regions where the sport is popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or binary data for the team's logo */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "championship_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the championship game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "rank_mean" REAL /* Mean ranking of the coach */,
  "win_max" INTEGER /* Maximum number of wins by the coach */,
  "win_min" INTEGER /* Minimum number of wins by the coach */,
  "finals" INTEGER /* Number of finals appearances by the coach */,
  "gfinal" INTEGER /* Number of grand finals appearances by the coach */,
  "champ" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the coach */,
  "spoon" INTEGER /* Number of spoon awards won by the coach */,
  "sim" INTEGER /* Number of simulations run for the coach */,
  "pcnt_finals" REAL /* Percentage of finals appearances by the coach */,
  "pcnt_gfinal" REAL /* Percentage of grand finals appearances by the coach */,
  "pcnt_champ" REAL /* Percentage of championships won by the coach */,
  "pcnt_spoon" REAL /* Percentage of spoon awards won by the coach */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games coached */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws (if applicable) */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "loss_percentage" REAL /* Loss percentage */,
  "draw_percentage" REAL /* Draw percentage (if applicable) */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_performance_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_seasons" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "role" TEXT /* Coach's role during the season (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started coaching in the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach stopped coaching in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Binary data for the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the visualization */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the metric */,
  "old_data" TEXT /* Old performance data before the update */,
  "new_data" TEXT /* New performance data after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_performance_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_performance_history_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES coach_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., performance, leadership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_awards_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
